name: get-readme
description: Extract the rendered README content from the current GitHub repository page.
execute: async () => { const tmp = location.pathname.split('/'); const author = tmp[1]; const project = tmp[2]; const content = await fetch(`https://api.github.com/repos/${author}/${project}/readme`, { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3.raw' } }).then(response => response.text()); return { content }; }
